jangpm.label: Jangpm Lecture Deck
jangpm.summary: Korean-first lecture/report deck with monochrome + single #4633E3 indigo accent. Pretendard typography, 8px grid, Lucide line-art icons. Every content slide ends with a `.gm` governing message line.
jangpm.tone: Editorial, minimal, report-style, restrained. Notion/Linear/Vercel sensibility adapted to Korean instructional content.
jangpm.themeMode: Light only — warm off-white `#FAFAF9` background, `#1A1A1A` text, `#4633E3` single accent.
